render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: Period live-action jungle adventure; photoreal animals and humans share one continuous realistic medium—no cartoon stylization. Warm earth and leaf tones by day; moonlit blues at Council Rock; fire as the sole hard orange; wet fog and pearly light on seal beaches; dusty cantonment and mud-camp realism for later tales.
performance_lock: PERFORMANCE LOCK: Objective storybook anthology staging with a framing storyteller voice; default gaze is character-to-character and scene action, not the viewer. Animals speak with full dramatic address to partners while bodies stay species-true. Human village and camp scenes play naturalistically. Brief first-person camp episode places the Narrator on camera among animals who converse among themselves as if overheard.

Character_Narrator.description: Lean English man, mid-30s to 40s, period moustache, angular face, weathered outdoor skin, short neat hair; default look in shirt-sleeves under a waterproof coat.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult male, educated Anglo-Indian cadence, medium pitch, unhurried clear pace, warm ironic energy; same voice for V.O. bridges and on-camera lines.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Same lean build, period moustache, short neat hair, angular weathered face, shirt-sleeves under waterproof coat in every on-camera beat; never aged into an elderly man. Distinct from Teddy's Father (family man, bungalow) and Petersen Sahib (mustached Keddah chief).
Character_Narrator.performance_notes: V.O. addresses the implied listener; on-camera he reacts as a participant in the camp stampede, not a podium host.

Character_Father_Wolf.description: Adult lean gray Indian wolf, male, rangy muscle under coarse gray coat, pale underbelly, amber eyes, long muzzle, alert ears.
Character_Father_Wolf.voice_profile: Adult male, low-medium gravel, clipped jungle cadence, controlled heat when angry; steady pack-authority energy.
Character_Father_Wolf.visual_lock: Lean gray coat and rangy male silhouette every scene; never as bulky as Akela or as pale as Gray Brother cubs. Same scar-free working-pack face.

Character_Mother_Wolf.description: Great gray she-wolf (Raksha), heavy maternal build, big gray nose, thick ruff, green-reflecting eyes, powerful shoulders.
Character_Mother_Wolf.voice_profile: Adult female, low rich alto, velvet that turns to steel roar; fierce maternal energy, never shrill.
Character_Mother_Wolf.visual_lock: Larger heavier gray she-wolf than Father Wolf; green-reflecting eyes and broad unique versus other pack wolves. Same great gray coat always.

Character_Wolf_Cubs.description: Four small gray wolf cubs, soft puppy coats, oversized paws and ears, dark muzzle masks, bright curious eyes.
Character_Wolf_Cubs.voice_profile: High puppy yelps and squeals; minimal speech, animal play energy.
Character_Wolf_Cubs.visual_lock: Four matching Seeonee gray cubs—soft juvenile coats, not adult lean hunters—readable as one litter beside Mother Wolf.

Character_Tabaqui.description: Indian jackal, smaller than the wolves, dusty scruffy coat, bushy tail, pointed muzzle, bright eyes, low posture, lean ribs.
Character_Tabaqui.voice_profile: Adult male, thin nasal whine, quick oily pace, spiteful delighted energy; singsong flattery that turns spiteful.
Character_Tabaqui.visual_lock: Jackal proportions—not wolf—scruffy coat, bushy tail, and bright eyes every appearance; always smaller and scruffier than pack wolves.

Character_Shere_Khan.description: Huge adult male Bengal tiger, great and massive shoulders, rich orange coat with bold black stripes, white ruffs, amber eyes; permanently lame in one forefoot from birth.
Character_Shere_Khan.voice_profile: Deep adult male roar-bass, dry angry snarly singsong when thwarted; arrogant thunderous energy.
Character_Shere_Khan.visual_lock: Largest cat on screen, lame forefoot, and massive bulk never drift. Distinct from Bagheera's black panther sleekness.

Character_Mowgli.description: Indian human male: brown skin, long dark hair, hard bare feet; ages from soft dimpled toddler just walking, to bare jungle child about 7, to lean athletic nearly grown youth with jungle-scarred limbs.
Character_Mowgli.voice_profile: Boy treble aging to adolescent male; clear bold diction, jungle-trained cadence, proud then wounded energy; same identity across ages.
Character_Mowgli.visual_lock: Same continuous brown-skinned Indian male face aging toddler to child to youth; long dark hair, hard bare feet, jungle-scarred limbs. Never a pale European child; distinct from Teddy and Little Toomai.
Character_Mowgli.performance_notes: Addresses animal brothers as equals; among villagers stands apart, imitates speech, holds fire and hide with defiant directness to the Pack.

Character_Akela.description: Large mature male gray wolf, full gray coat, heavy bone structure, strong dignified muzzle.
Character_Akela.voice_profile: Deep adult male, measured ceremonial pace, authority without shout until challenged; later weary but clear.
Character_Akela.visual_lock: Largest gray wolf, heavy bulk, full gray coat, strong muzzle—never jackal-lean.

Character_Young_Wolf.description: Young adult Seeonee wolf in fourth year, leaner and darker-mixed gray than Akela, intense eyes.
Character_Young_Wolf.voice_profile: Young adult male, sharper higher growl than Akela, impatient pack energy.
Character_Young_Wolf.visual_lock: Fourth-year male—not cub, not Akela’s bulk—distinct pack face.

Character_Baloo.description: Large old brown sloth bear, heavy body, shaggy brown coat, blunt muzzle, small eyes, big padded paws, furry stomach.
Character_Baloo.voice_profile: Deep warm adult male, slow deliberate pace, gruff tenderness that can thunder; patient then hurt pride.
Character_Baloo.visual_lock: Only brown bear—shaggy chocolate-brown coat, massive haunches, heavy bulk. Never black like Bagheera or striped like Shere Khan.

Character_Bagheera.description: Adult black panther (melanistic leopard), inky black coat with ghost rosettes visible as a subtle sheen pattern in light, sleek muscular body, soft fur, green eyes, white whiskers.
Character_Bagheera.voice_profile: Adult male, soft honey-low baritone, amused precise diction, controlled lethal calm; purrs and dry rebuke.
Character_Bagheera.visual_lock: Inky black coat with ghost-rosette sheen under light; sleek panther build always—never brown bear bulk or tiger stripes. Green eyes.

Character_Bandar_Log.description: Troop of gray langur-like monkeys—long limbs, gray fur, black faces and hands, restless tails.
Character_Bandar_Log.voice_profile: Many high chattering voices, boastful overlapping pace, manic shallow energy; stolen scraps of jungle speech.
Character_Bandar_Log.visual_lock: Gray monkey troop identity: gray coats, black faces, group mass; never solitary hero framing. Readable mass with a few foreground faces.

Character_Rann.description: Large kite (bird of prey), brown and white underwings, hooked beak, very keen eyes, long wings.
Character_Rann.voice_profile: Adult male, thin whistling carry, quick report cadence, cool aerial confidence.
Character_Rann.visual_lock: High-soaring kite silhouette and brown-and-white wing markings constant; only speaking raptor ally.

Character_Kaa.description: Huge rock python about thirty feet, thick muscular coils, gleaming patterned scales, scarred nose, bright eyes.
Character_Kaa.voice_profile: Adult male, long sibilant bass, unhurried hypnotic pace, dry humor under menace; humming song energy in the Hunger Dance.
Character_Kaa.visual_lock: Longest reptile on screen—thirty-foot bulk, scarred nose, gleaming scales. Distinct from shorter cobras Nag/Nagaina.

Character_Cobras_Cold_Lairs.description: Indian cobras—hooded, scaled bodies; dusty ruin-dwelling snakes smaller than Kaa.
Character_Cobras_Cold_Lairs.voice_profile: Dry hissing ensemble, irritated warning tone, brief lines.
Character_Cobras_Cold_Lairs.visual_lock: Hooded cobras; smaller than Kaa; not Nag/Nagaina’s garden pair.

Character_Gray_Brother.description: Young gray wolf, lean gray coat, soft gray nose, lean build.
Character_Gray_Brother.voice_profile: Young adult male, clear mid wolf tone, earnest steady energy.
Character_Gray_Brother.visual_lock: Younger leaner gray wolf than Akela/Father Wolf; soft gray nose cue; lean gray wolf face.

Character_Tattered_Wolf.description: Gaunt adult pack wolf, mangy tattered coat, shot-scarred or trap-lame look, hollow flanks.
Character_Tattered_Wolf.voice_profile: Adult male, rough tired growl, pleading pack energy.
Character_Tattered_Wolf.visual_lock: Visibly tattered mangy coat and damaged condition unique among named wolves; not Akela’s noble gray.

Character_Messua.description: Kind-faced Indian village woman, adult, warm brown skin, dark hair, soft maternal eyes; simple rural sari/cloth of a Waingunga-plain household.
Character_Messua.voice_profile: Adult female, warm mid register, gentle urgent pace, grieving-kind energy.
Character_Messua.visual_lock: Same kind maternal face and village-woman dress; distinct from Alice’s English bungalow mother and Toomai’s Mother.
wardrobe_always: simple Indian village sari or wrap

Character_Priest.description: Big fat Indian village priest, white clothes, red-and-yellow caste mark on forehead, heavy belly and jowls.
Character_Priest.voice_profile: Adult male, full loud carrying voice, ceremonial then panicky condemnation.
Character_Priest.visual_lock: Obesity, white garments, and red-yellow forehead mark locked; never confused with lean Buldeo hunter.

Character_Buldeo.description: Adult Indian village hunter, lean weathered man with Tower musket, waist-cloth.
Character_Buldeo.voice_profile: Adult male, rough boastful baritone, angry bluster when mocked.
Character_Buldeo.visual_lock: Musket-carrying hunter silhouette and weathered village-male face; distinct from fat Priest.

Character_Villagers.description: Crowd of North Indian plain villagers—men, women, children in dhotis, saris, turbans; herd-boys, yellow pariah dogs at edges.
Character_Villagers.voice_profile: Overlapping adult shouts, fear and accusation, chorus of ‘Wolf!’ energy.
Character_Villagers.visual_lock: Period rural Indian crowd palette; readable mass without inventing named faces beyond Priest, Messua, Buldeo.

Character_Sea_Catch.description: Huge fifteen-year-old gray fur seal bull, nearly a mane on shoulders, long wicked dog-teeth, scarred all over from fights; stands over four feet on flippers, about 700 lb bulk.
Character_Sea_Catch.voice_profile: Deep adult male roar, gruff short lines, proud fighting energy.
Character_Sea_Catch.visual_lock: Largest scarred gray beachmaster; mane shoulders and dog-teeth always; father to white Kotick—never white himself.

Character_Matkah.description: Adult female fur seal, gentler softer bulk than Sea Catch, smooth dark coat, maternal eyes.
Character_Matkah.voice_profile: Adult female, soft cooing mid tone, soothing then anxious counsel.
Character_Matkah.visual_lock: Gentle dark cow seal—no heavy scarred mane; constant mother pairing with white pup Kotick.

Character_Kotick.description: The White Seal: born with pale watery-blue eyes, large head and shoulders; grows to pure white fur, full-grown sea-catch bulk with curly white mane, heavy build matching his father.
Character_Kotick.voice_profile: Young male aging to powerful adult roar; clear determined pace, visionary then battle fury.
Character_Kotick.visual_lock: Only pure-white fur seal—white mane as adult, blue-eyed youth; unmistakable versus gray Sea Catch and dark holluschickie.

Character_Young_Seal.description: Young adult dark fur seal about Kotick’s age, beach-fighter bulk, dark coat without white.
Character_Young_Seal.voice_profile: Young adult male, ugly chuckle edge, taunting pace.
Character_Young_Seal.visual_lock: Dark holluschickie/young catch—never white; foil fighter build to Kotick.

Character_Seals_Chorus.description: Mass of fur seals—bulls, cows, holluschickie bachelors, pups—dark coats in dense groups on basalt and sand.
Character_Seals_Chorus.voice_profile: Thousands of tired blended voices; deep-sea choral song, sad anthem energy on Lukannon verses.
Character_Seals_Chorus.visual_lock: Living dark seal carpet and swimming groups; not individually hero-framed except when answering Kotick.

Character_Sea_Cow.description: Great sea-cow (manatee-like), huge slow gray-brown body, calm face.
Character_Sea_Cow.voice_profile: Mostly silent presence; occasional deep aquatic breath sounds, no chatter.
Character_Sea_Cow.visual_lock: Manatee bulk and slow underwater grace—unique non-seal marine mammal.

Character_Rikki_Tikki.description: Small Indian mongoose, catlike fur, weasel-like head, pink eyes and restless pink nose, bottle-brush tail when roused, ivory fangs.
Character_Rikki_Tikki.voice_profile: Young male, quick bright chatter-baritone, rapid curious pace, modest practical courage after victory.
Character_Rikki_Tikki.visual_lock: Same small mongoose body—pink nose/eyes, catlike fur, bottle-brush tail fluff in fight—hero scale versus five-foot cobras. Never a cat or dog.

Character_Teddy.description: Small English boy in Segowlee cantonment, fair colonial child, period light clothes, big eyes.
Character_Teddy.voice_profile: Child male treble, bright simple lines, startled then trusting energy.
Character_Teddy.visual_lock: Fair English child face and bungalow-boy wardrobe; distinct from brown Mowgli and Little Toomai.
wardrobe_always: period English child’s light colonial clothes

Character_Alice.description: Teddy’s Mother—English woman Alice, adult, kind face, period bungalow dress.
Character_Alice.voice_profile: Adult female, educated English mid tone, worried warmth.
Character_Alice.visual_lock: English memsahib face and period dress; named Alice in dialogue; not Messua or Toomai’s Mother.

Character_Teddys_Father.description: Big Englishman, adult male, period colonial shirt and trousers, solid paternal build; moustache optional.
Character_Teddys_Father.voice_profile: Adult male, calm assured English baritone, practical reassurance.
Character_Teddys_Father.visual_lock: Large English father silhouette—bigger than lean Narrator; bungalow domestic, not Petersen’s field kit.

Character_Darzee.description: Tailor-bird male, small songbird, olive-brown upperparts, pale underparts, long tail feathers.
Character_Darzee.voice_profile: High fluting male bird voice, musical boastful pace, easily distracted praise-singer.
Character_Darzee.visual_lock: Tiny tailor-bird shape and long tail display; small singer identity versus mongoose scale.

Character_Darzees_Wife.description: Female tailor-bird, slightly duller small songbird, same species as Darzee.
Character_Darzees_Wife.voice_profile: High female bird tone, sharper practical urgency than Darzee.
Character_Darzees_Wife.visual_lock: Matching tailor-bird pair scale; quieter duller plumage than male Darzee.

Character_Nag.description: Big black cobra, five feet long, spectacled hood spread, dull glowing eyes, thick body; spectacle mark on hood.
Character_Nag.voice_profile: Adult male, cold low hiss-speech, proud god-mark arrogance, slow menace.
Character_Nag.visual_lock: Five-foot black cobra male—hood mark, dull glowing eyes—garden threat; pair with Nagaina, shorter than Kaa.

Character_Nagaina.description: Adult female cobra, sleek hooded body, black-olive sheen matching Nag, intense eyes.
Character_Nagaina.voice_profile: Adult female, sharper venomous hiss-voice, grief-rage intensity, bargaining then strike fury.
Character_Nagaina.visual_lock: Female cobra paired to Nag—same species hooded threat, distinct head shape from male.

Character_Chuchundra.description: Muskrat, small brown wet-furred rodent, timid low posture along walls, whiskered pointed face.
Character_Chuchundra.voice_profile: Thin whispering male, sorrowful frightened pace, almost never comes into the middle of the room.
Character_Chuchundra.visual_lock: Tiny muskrat—not mongoose—hugging walls; small timid silhouette versus Rikki’s bold stance.

Character_Kala_Nag.description: Great Asian elephant nearly seventy years old; ten feet at the shoulder, dark wrinkled hide, tusks cut short at five feet and bound with copper bands; large eyes, soft trunk.
Character_Kala_Nag.voice_profile: Mostly elephantine rumbles and trumpet; obedient silent power under mahout command, rare deep breath-voice if used.
Character_Kala_Nag.visual_lock: Largest elephant—ten-foot height, copper-banded short tusks, dark hide. Distinct from Pudmini she-elephant and gun-team elephant in camp tale.

Character_Big_Toomai.description: Weathered adult Indian mahout, dark sun-leathered skin, strong hands, working camp clothes; adult father build.
Character_Big_Toomai.voice_profile: Adult male, gruff Hindi-English cadence, scolding bass, practical camp energy.
Character_Big_Toomai.visual_lock: Adult mahout build and weathered face—older heavier than Little Toomai.

Character_Little_Toomai.description: Indian boy ten years old, four feet high, sun-bleached brown hair flying loose, barefoot jungle-camp child in a single rag garment.
Character_Little_Toomai.voice_profile: Child male, high-pitched yells in Keddah, bashful whisper before Sahib; eager wild energy.
Character_Little_Toomai.visual_lock: Small four-foot rag-clad boy, sun-bleached brown flying hair—unique versus Mowgli’s long black jungle hair and Teddy’s fair English look.

Character_Petersen_Sahib.description: English Keddah chief, adult man, field mustache, solar-topee era colonial hunting dress.
Character_Petersen_Sahib.voice_profile: Adult male, amused English command voice, gentle when addressing the boy, clear carrying pace.
Character_Petersen_Sahib.visual_lock: Mustached white Keddah sahib—distinct from bungalow Teddy’s Father and lean camp Narrator.

Character_Machua_Appa.description: Head tracker, adult Assamese/jungle Indian man, lean scarred hunter build, gun and field cloth.
Character_Machua_Appa.voice_profile: Adult male, ringing proclamation voice, proud ceremonial energy in the renaming speech.
Character_Machua_Appa.visual_lock: Native head-tracker face and hunter kit—not plains mahout Big Toomai.

Character_Pudmini.description: Clever adult she-elephant, slightly smaller than Kala Nag, working government elephant, calm intelligent eye.
Character_Pudmini.voice_profile: Soft elephant rumbles; mostly silent obedient presence.
Character_Pudmini.visual_lock: She-elephant without Kala Nag’s copper-stumped tusk signature; paired to Petersen’s seat.

Character_Toomais_Mother.description: Young Indian woman in simple sari, soft maternal face.
Character_Toomais_Mother.voice_profile: Young adult female, clear soft singing voice, lullaby pace, tender finish to whisper.
Character_Toomais_Mother.visual_lock: Young mother in simple sari—distinct from Messua and Alice.
Character_Toomais_Mother.performance_notes: Primarily sings to the baby; intimate hut staging, not public address.

Character_Vixen.description: Sharp fox terrier, white with brown markings, small dog carriage.
Character_Vixen.voice_profile: Small dog yap, quick conceited remarks, loyal to Narrator.
Character_Vixen.visual_lock: White-and-brown fox terrier only—small dog scale among mules and camels; never mongoose shape.

Character_Camp_Runner.description: Adult camp man, period soldier-servant clothes, wet camp kit.
Character_Camp_Runner.voice_profile: Adult male, shouted urgent alarm, single burst energy.
Character_Camp_Runner.visual_lock: Brief human messenger—distinct face from Narrator; soaked camp kit.

Character_Billy.description: Tough screw-gun mule, straps rings and chains on saddle-pad, campaigner build; breech-piece mule of number two gun, First Screw Battery.
Character_Billy.voice_profile: Adult male mule voice, dry cockney-soldier wit, impatient practical energy.
Character_Billy.visual_lock: Harnessed screw-gun mule with full pad chains—not troop horse elegance; old-campaigner mule stance.

Character_Baggage_Camel.description: Large baggage camel of the 39th Native Infantry, soft feet, long bobbing neck, humped bulk.
Character_Baggage_Camel.voice_profile: Adult male, bubbling humbly frightened tone, apologetic slow pace.
Character_Baggage_Camel.visual_lock: Only speaking camel—long neck, baggage straps, doubled-up sit; contrast to Billy and Troop-Horse.

Character_Troop_Horse.description: Big Australian cavalry mount, Number Fifteen, E troop, Ninth Lancers; parade-fit, silky tail when groomed, one ear forward one back.
Character_Troop_Horse.voice_profile: Adult male, polished confident diction, parade-ground pride, disdain for camels.
Character_Troop_Horse.visual_lock: Tall cavalry horse—Australian type, Lancer condition—never mule stockiness.

Character_Gun_Bullocks.description: Pair of enormous patient gun-bullocks, heavy flanks, heavy yokes, slaty working cattle build.
Character_Gun_Bullocks.voice_profile: Deep slow dual cattle voices, patient factual energy about pulling guns.
Character_Gun_Bullocks.visual_lock: Yoked twin bullocks—massive cattle, not horses; calm working pair.

Character_Gun_Elephant.description: Huge gun-team elephant, forty years’ service, harnessed to siege gun; trunk and dual-end bulk.
Character_Gun_Elephant.voice_profile: Deep soft amused rumble, elder peacemaker pace among the battery beasts.
Character_Gun_Elephant.visual_lock: Artillery elephant in gun harness—not Kala Nag’s copper tusks or Keddah kit; night lines beside cannon.

Character_Amir.description: Amir of Afghanistan, Central Asian king, high big black astrakhan-wool hat, great diamond star, horseman in royal riding dress.
Character_Amir.voice_profile: Mostly silent on-screen presence; commanding stillness, eyes widening at the review advance.
Character_Amir.visual_lock: Astrakhan hat and diamond star signature; Central Asian royal horseman—brief review presence.
